meta.name: Ballet Dancer In-Season Program
meta.description: Push/Pull split when week allows. Full Body on constrained weeks. Lower body + plyo separate. Optional hypertrophy.

AP.name: Push — Partnering Strength
AP.fullName: Day Push — Overhead Strength & Shoulder Health

exercises.name: Overhead Barbell Press
exercises.note: Primary partnering lift. Full lockout at top.

exercises.name: Weighted Dips
exercises.note: Triceps lockout transfers directly to holding overhead lifts.

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Single-Arm DB Press
exercises.note: Kneeling removes leg drive — pure shoulder stability.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises (strict)
exercises.note: Slow lower. No swinging.

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slides
exercises.note: Scapular control. Slide arms up wall keeping contact.

AL.name: Pull — Lifting Mechanics
AL.fullName: Day Pull — Back Strength & Posterior Chain

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Ups
exercises.note: Dead hang to chin over bar. Full ROM every rep.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.note: Hip hinge — feel hamstring stretch. Stop when back rounds.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row (1-sec pause)
exercises.note: 1-sec hold at chest. Elbows drive back.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Rope at eye height. External rotate at end — hands finish by ears.

exercises.name: Farmer's Carries
exercises.note: Tall posture, slight shoulder pack. Grip and trunk stability.

AF.name: Full Body — Upper
AF.fullName: Day Full Body — Compressed Upper (Constrained Week)

B.name: Lower Body & Trunk
B.fullName: Day B — Lower Body Strength, Turnout & Trunk

exercises.name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
exercises.note: 3-sec eccentric lower. #1 hamstring injury prevention. Partner holds ankles.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.note: Rear foot elevated on bench. Upright torso. Feel front glute loading.

exercises.name: Single-Leg RDL
exercises.note: Hinge at hip, slight knee bend. Maintain level hips throughout.

exercises.name: Hip External Rotation (cable)
exercises.note: Seated or side-lying with cable at ankle. Rotate leg outward against resistance. Targets piriformis and short external rotators — turnout support.

exercises.name: Copenhagen Plank
exercises.note: Top leg on bench, bottom leg lifted off floor. Adductor and groin protection.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.note: Press straight out from chest — resist rotating toward cable.

exercises.name: Tibialis Raises + Foot Intrinsics
exercises.note: Tibialis: heels on raised surface, raise toes rhythmically. Foot intrinsics: seated, short foot arch lifts, toe spreads. Achilles and plantar fascia protection.

exercises.name: Box Jumps (max height intent)
exercises.note: Always first — CNS freshest. Step down, never jump down. Full intent every rep.

exercises.name: Pogos
exercises.note: Minimal ground contact time. Stiff ankle springs. Rhythm over height.

exercises.name: Broad Jumps
exercises.note: Max horizontal distance. Stick the landing before next rep.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row (1-sec pause)
exercises.note: Upper back maintenance. After plyo — fatigue is expected here.

exercises.name: Hammer Curls + Rope Pushdowns
exercises.note: Superset: curls into pushdowns immediately. Rest after both.

poor_sleep.label: Poor sleep
poor_sleep.note: Reduce plyometric volume by 1 set. Strength work unchanged.

high_fatigue.label: High fatigue
high_fatigue.note: Drop 1 set from each exercise. Keep prescribed RPE.

low_energy.label: Low energy
low_energy.note: Cap all exercises at RPE 7. Volume unchanged.

heavy_legs.label: Heavy legs
heavy_legs.note: Reduce lower body & plyo by 1 set. Upper body unchanged.

upper_soreness.label: Upper body soreness
upper_soreness.note: Reduce upper body by 1 set. Soreness is safe to train through.

hip_knee.label: Hip / knee tightness
hip_knee.note: Shorten ROM on lower body. Reduce plyo sets by 1.

shoulder.label: Shoulder tightness
shoulder.note: Reduce pressing load 10–15%. Pull-ups bodyweight only.

dull_ache.label: Dull joint ache
dull_ache.note: Monitor during warm-up. Skip that movement if pain increases.

sharp_pain.label: Sharp / acute pain
sharp_pain.note: Do not train through sharp pain. Requires physiotherapist assessment.
